task_completion.description: Locate the CUSTOM_PAYLOAD node in the Webots scene tree or world file
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Webots scene tree is visible with the 'CUSTOM_PAYLOAD' Solid node expanded, or a text editor is open showing the 'CUSTOM_PAYLOAD' definition in the .wbt file.

task_completion.description: Set the mass of the CUSTOM_PAYLOAD to 120.0 kg
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'mass' field under the Physics node of 'CUSTOM_PAYLOAD' is set to 120.0 in the Webots GUI or text editor.

task_completion.description: Set the center of mass of the CUSTOM_PAYLOAD to 0.12 -0.05 0.18
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'centerOfMass' field under the Physics node of 'CUSTOM_PAYLOAD' is set to [0.12, -0.05, 0.18] in the Webots GUI or text editor.

task_completion.description: Set the maxTorque for the left_motor to 80.0 Nm
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'maxTorque' field for the RotationalMotor named 'left_motor' is set to 80.0.

task_completion.description: Set the maxTorque for the right_motor to 80.0 Nm
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'maxTorque' field for the RotationalMotor named 'right_motor' is set to 80.0.

task_completion.description: Save the configured world to the specified Desktop path
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save World As' dialog in Webots or a terminal/file manager confirms the file 'agv_heavy_payload.wbt' is saved to '/home/ga/Desktop/'.

integrity.description: Agent actually modified the simulation file rather than running a pre-made script to bypass the task
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent interacting with the Webots GUI (scene tree/field editor) or manually editing the .wbt file in a text editor.

integrity.description: Agent manually entered the specific physics and torque values
integrity.visual_evidence: The values 120.0, 0.12 -0.05 0.18, and 80.0 can be seen being typed or actively applied in the interface.

integrity.description: Agent explicitly saved the file to the new requested name instead of just overwriting the default world
integrity.visual_evidence: The Webots window title changes to 'agv_heavy_payload.wbt' or a 'Save As' action is visible targeting the Desktop.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output path is exactly '/home/ga/Desktop/agv_heavy_payload.wbt'. The payload node is named 'CUSTOM_PAYLOAD' and must have its mass set to 120.0 and center of mass set to [0.12, -0.05, 0.18]. The robot base is named 'AGV_BASE'. Both 'left_motor' and 'right_motor' must have their maxTorque set to 80.0. The starting mass was 1.0 and starting torque was 10.0.
